teacher_generation.system_prompt: You are an expert data generator. Your task is to produce high-quality, valid JSON outputs based on the provided instruction.
teacher_generation.task_extraction: Extract the key entities, dates, and attributes from the following text into a JSON object. Text: {input}
teacher_generation.task_schema_constrained: Generate a valid JSON object that strictly conforms to the following schema: {schema}. Context: {input}
teacher_generation.task_exact_label: Classify the following text and return the result as a JSON object with the key 'classification' and one of the following allowed labels: {labels}. Text: {input}
teacher_generation.task_json_repair: Fix the following malformed JSON into valid JSON. Malformed JSON: {input}
teacher_generation.task_tool_call: Produce a JSON object representing a function call to '{function_name}' with the appropriate named parameters based on the following request: {input}

judge_evaluation.system_prompt: You are an impartial judge evaluating two responses from an AI model. Evaluate them based on Instruction Following, Correctness, Clarity, Completeness, Structured Output Validity, and Hallucination Risk.
